name: awk
description: Pattern-directed scanning and text processing language. Reads from standard input line by line, splits each line into fields ($1, $2, etc.), and applies pattern-action rules. Supports field separators (-F), variables (-v), conditionals, loops, arithmetic, and built-in functions (length, substr, split, printf). Use for extracting columns from tabular data, computing sums and averages, reformatting output, or filtering lines by field values.

input.description: Text to process, provided on standard input. The first argument is the awk program (e.g. '{print $1}', '-F, {sum+=$2} END{print sum}').

output.description: Processed output as specified by the awk program, one line per output statement.
